zh.lifeSummary: 當Dubgall Mac Somairle King of the Isles於1143年出生在英國蘇格蘭阿吉爾莫文時，他的父親Somerled MacGillebride King of the Northern Isles30歲，母親Ragnhilda (Olafsdatter) Olafsdottir26歲。他於大約1162年與Margaret Stuart of Moidart在蘇格蘭阿吉爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1228年登記服兵役。他去世於1207年在蘇格蘭阿吉爾享年64歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾阿爾哈坦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dubgall Mac Somairle King of the Isles于1143年出生在英国苏格兰阿吉爾莫文时，他的父亲Somerled MacGillebride King of the Northern Isles30岁，母亲Ragnhilda (Olafsdatter) Olafsdottir26岁。他于大约1162年与Margaret Stuart of Moidart在苏格兰阿吉爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1228年登记服兵役。他去世于1207年在苏格兰阿吉爾享年64岁，埋葬在苏格兰阿吉爾阿爾哈坦。

nameMeanings.name: Mac
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Cuong, Minh, Lien, Muoi, Thanh, Tho, Tieu, Vinh, Anh, Beo, Binh, Chau.
Chinese: variant Romanization of the surnames 麥 (see   Mai   2) and 莫 (see   Mo   1).
Vietnamese (Mạc): from Chinese 莫 ‘nothing; nonexistent’; see Mo 1.

variants.name: Mai
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Thanh, Hoa, Son, Dung, Long, Binh, Minh, Thu, Hue, Huong, Thuy.  Chinese Chi, Hong, Ho, Sang, Han, Hang, Jian, Li, Man, Mei, Sen, Wei.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 麥, meaning ‘wheat’ in Chinese: (i) from Mai Qiu (麥丘), the title of a man in the state of Qi (located mainly in present-day Shandong province) during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), who, despite being very old, came to celebrate the birthday of the Duke Huan of Qi (ruler of the state of Qi, died 643  BC ). His descendants inherited 麥, the first part of his title, as their surname. (ii) borne by descendants of Mai Tie Zhang (麥鐵杖), a famous general during the Sui dynasty (581–618  AD ). His descendants were scattered around southern China.

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 買, meaning ‘buy’ in Chinese: (i) borne by descendants of the king Song Weizi, founder of the state of Song. (ii) borne by descendants of the Duke Dao of Xu (ruler of the state of Xu, 546–523  BC ), possibly inheriting his personal name. (iii) from the first element of the personal name Mai Zhu Chu (買朱鉏), style name of an official who lived during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (iv) it has also been traced back to other ethnic groups in northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Dubgall
meanings: Irish dhu, from dub, black, and gall, a stranger, meaning a black stranger

variants.name: Dugald
meanings: Anglicized form of Dubhghall . The final -d is due to a mishearing of the Gaelic form, in which the final -ll sounds like -ld to English ears.

en.lifeSummary: When Dubgall Mac Somairle King of the Isles was born in 1143, in Morven, Argyll, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Somerled MacGillebride King of the Northern Isles, was 30 and his mother, Ragnhilda (Olafsdatter) Olafsdottir, was 26. He married Margaret Stuart of Moidart about 1162, in Argyll, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He registered for military service in 1228. He died in 1207, in Argyll, Scotland, at the age of 64, and was buried in Ardchattan, Argyll, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dubgall Mac Somairle King of the Isles est né en 1143, à Morven, Argyll, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Somerled MacGillebride King of the Northern Isles, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Ragnhilda (Olafsdatter) Olafsdottir, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Stuart of Moidart environ 1162, à Argyll, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1228. Il est décédé en 1207, à Argyll, Écosse, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Ardchattan, Argyll, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dubgall Mac Somairle King of the Isles 1143 in Morven, Argyll, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Somerled MacGillebride King of the Northern Isles 30 und seine Mutter Ragnhilda (Olafsdatter) Olafsdottir 26. Er hat um 1162 in Argyll, Scotland Margaret Stuart of Moidart geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1228 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb 1207 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Argyll, Scotland und wurde in Ardchattan, Argyll, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dubgall Mac Somairle King of the Isles è nato il nel 1143 nel Morven, Argyll, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Somerled MacGillebride King of the Northern Isles, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Ragnhilda (Olafsdatter) Olafsdottir, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Stuart of Moidart circa 1162, nel Argyll, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1228. Morì nel 1207, nel Argyll, Scotland, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Ardchattan, Argyll, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Dubgall Mac Somairle King of the Islesが1143年にイギリススコットランドアルグイルモーベンで生まれた時，父Somerled MacGillebride King of the Northern Islesは30歳，母Ragnhilda (Olafsdatter) Olafsdottirは26歳であった。約1162年にスコットランドアルグイルでMargaret Stuart of Moidartと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1228年に兵役登録をした。彼は1207年にスコットランドアルグイルで64歳で死去し，スコットランドアルグイルアルドチャッタンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Dubgall Mac Somairle King of the Isles(이)가 1143년 영국 스코틀랜드 아그이 모르븐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Somerled MacGillebride King of the Northern Isles(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Ragnhilda (Olafsdatter) Olafsdottir(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1162년 스컷랜드 아그이에서 Margaret Stuart of Moidart(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1228년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1207년 스컷랜드 아그이에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이 아드차탠에 묻혔다.

mn.Morven, Argyllshire, Scotland: Morven, Argyle, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dubgall Mac Somairle King of the Isles nasceu em 1143, em Morven, Argyll, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Somerled MacGillebride King of the Northern Isles, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Ragnhilda (Olafsdatter) Olafsdottir, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Stuart of Moidart aproximadamente 1162, em Argyll, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1228. Ele faleceu em 1207, em Argyll, Scotland, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Ardchattan, Argyll, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dubgall Mac Somairle King of the Isles родился в 1143 г. в местности морвен, аргилл, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Somerled MacGillebride King of the Northern Isles было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Ragnhilda (Olafsdatter) Olafsdottir, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Stuart of Moidart около 1162 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. В 1228 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер в 1207 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности ардчаттань, аргилл, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dubgall Mac Somairle King of the Isles nació en 1143, en Morven, Argyll, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Somerled MacGillebride King of the Northern Isles, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Ragnhilda (Olafsdatter) Olafsdottir, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Margaret Stuart of Moidart aproximadamente 1162, en Argyll, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1228. Murió en 1207, en Argyll, Scotland, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Ardchattan, Argyll, Scotland.
